title: Principal Plant Manager at Hyundai India Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Principal Plant Manager at Hyundai India Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Plant Manager with drive and ambition, Hyundai India Ventures Solutions in Surat is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Hyundai India Ventures Solutions:
Hyundai India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hyundai India Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
